title: Cymbachne tsaratananensis
taxonomy: Cymbachne tsaratananensis is classified within the family Restionaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as restiads. This family comprises about 250 species, primarily found in Southern Hemisphere regions. Cymbachne tsaratananensis is further classified within the genus Cymbachne, which is a monotypic genus, containing only one species. The classification of Cymbachne tsaratananensis is based on its distinctive characteristics and morphological features. It is a type of sedge, a perennial plant with narrow, grass-like leaves.
